title: anisomeles disticha
intro: Anisomeles disticha, also known as the "screw pine," is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which help to treat various ailments such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Anisomeles disticha include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular natural remedy in Ayurvedic medicine. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or oil, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
